resources.string:
ADgo uses Android Accessibility Service to detect and tap buttons like "Next" and "Skip", helping you skip in-app ads automatically.

How to use:
1. Tap the button below to open Accessibility Settings.
2. Find "ADgo" in downloaded services and enable it.
3. Return to the app. The service will run in the background.

Note: The service can affect all foreground apps. Disable it in Accessibility Settings when not needed.
When enabled, auto tapping works only for package names listed below. Separate multiple entries by new lines, commas, or semicolons.
When enabled, app selections and allowlist switch changes are saved automatically.
Select apps to apply auto actions
Search by app name or package name
ADgo monitors on-screen content and automatically taps ad skip buttons (Next / Skip / 下一步 / 跳过).
